title: rhinacanthus polonnaruwensis
intro: Rhinacanthus polonnaruwensis, also known as "R. polonnaruwensis", is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae, commonly referred to as a flowering plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rhinacanthus polonnaruwensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
